options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <fileNameList> # SPEF file or list of SPEF files

options.name: -extended
options.description: Enables reading of *llx, $L and $W statements in the SPEF file

options.name: -noStarN
options.description: Disables reading of *N statements in the SPEF file

options.name: -rc_corner
options.description: RC Corner, or list of RC Corners, to be used for annotation in multi-corner analysis mode

options.name: -scaleNets
options.description: Apply scaling on the specified nets

options.name: -scaleRC
options.description: Scales the RCs using PostRoute Scale-factors during SPEF-reading

options.name: -spef_field
options.description: Integer list of rc value indices

options.name: -starN
options.description: Enables reading of *N statements in the SPEF file
